projects.title: Brain Tumor Detection Using Deep Learning
projects.description: A brain tumor detection system leveraging Machine Learning and Deep Learning algorithms applied to MRI images. The system performs brain tumor prediction quickly with high accuracy, helping radiologists make faster clinical decisions and deliver timely treatment to patients.
highlights: Achieved 95%+ accuracy on MRI brain scan classification
Implemented CNN architecture with transfer learning
Built end-to-end pipeline: preprocessing → training → inference

projects.title: Real-Time Data Streaming Interface
projects.description: Engineered a high-performance real-time data streaming interface using C++ and WebSocket technology to simulate and transmit signal waveforms at Boeing.
highlights: Multiple WebSocket servers on independent ports
PXI-based hardware integration with minimal jitter
Precise timing control for synchronized data transmission

projects.title: Embedded Software Module — Flight Data Acquisition
projects.description: Led end-to-end design, implementation, and maintenance of a performance-critical software module for real-time data acquisition and processing at Boeing.
highlights: Processed serial bus, GPS, CAN protocol data packets
Cross-team collaboration with engineering, QA & systems
